name: palaceoftruth-memory
description: Install Palace of Truth as a scoped MCP memory adapter for Codex agents.

interface.shortDescription: Scoped Palace MCP memory for Codex agents
interface.longDescription: Use Palace of Truth as a local stdio MCP memory adapter for Codex. The package exposes the existing Palace memory tools, scope conventions, and non-destructive smoke workflow without adding admin, retry, delete, cleanup, transcript mining, or retrieval-ranking behavior.
defaultPrompt: Use Palace memory for this workspace
Run the Palace MCP dry-run smoke
